name: Divakar Reddy Varugu
summary: Backend / distributed-systems engineer with 3+ years building and operating 12+ live production microservices (NestJS/TypeScript and Java/Spring Boot). Relational-database practitioner — schema design, indexing, and query/performance tuning on MySQL and MSSQL (Azure-hosted) — and hands-on with PostgreSQL, Kafka, gRPC/Protobuf, Redis, Temporal.io, and CQRS/event sourcing, secured with JWT and Azure AD (MSAL). Focused on Azure data-platform / database-services engineering; strong Java DSA fundamentals.

skills.items: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL Server, MongoDB, Redis — relational data modeling, indexing, query & performance tuning, SQL migrations, TypeORM, Spring Data JPA
Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Saga, Domain-Driven Design
Apache Kafka, Redis pub/sub, Bull queues, Temporal.io, EventStore, KurrentDB
REST, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, WebSockets, OpenAPI/Swagger
Microsoft Azure (Blob Storage, Azure AD/MSAL, Azure Database for MySQL), Docker, CI/CD, Git, GitHub

experience.title: Backend Developer
bullets: Build and operate 12+ live NestJS/TypeScript microservices (auth, gateway, CRM, order-billing, MDM, TMS, work-order, transaction) used by Urbanrise, MyHome Constructions, IRA Realty, and The Trilight.
Model relational schemas and tune indexes/queries on Azure-hosted MySQL (TypeORM), reasoning about query plans and read/write performance under high-volume transactional load.
Architect inter-service communication via gRPC/Protobuf (100+ contracts), Apache Kafka event streams, and Redis pub/sub; apply CQRS and event sourcing (EventStore/KurrentDB).
Orchestrate long-running, fault-tolerant workflows with Temporal.io; build idempotent async pipelines (Bull) with retry/back-off for reliable at-least-once processing.
Secure services with JWT, Passport strategies, Azure AD (MSAL) SSO, and Redis-backed rate limiting; integrate Azure Blob Storage for document handling.
Maintain reliability of live production services through SQL migrations and production-issue diagnosis and mitigation.

experience.title: Backend Developer
bullets: Built REST APIs in Node.js/Express for a B2B learning platform serving 100,000+ users.
Designed MySQL data models tuned for fast aggregations and reliable persistence.
Implemented payment-gateway integration, JWT authentication, and role-based access control end-to-end.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Built Java and Spring Boot REST services on MSSQL Server for a Wall Street banking platform.
Implemented record-lifecycle modules (create, update, approve, audit) under regulatory-compliance constraints, with JUnit tests.

projects.name: Procurex — B2B Construction-Procurement Platform
projects.description: Multi-tenant RFQ-to-payment system built as 12+ NestJS microservices (auth, gateway, CRM, order-billing, MDM, TMS, work-order, transaction, notification, document) on Azure-hosted MySQL (TypeORM). Inter-service communication via gRPC/Protobuf (100+ contracts), Apache Kafka event streams, and Redis; CQRS and event sourcing (EventStore/KurrentDB); Temporal.io workflow orchestration; JWT + Azure AD (MSAL) security; Azure Blob Storage. Live with Urbanrise, MyHome Constructions, IRA Realty, and The Trilight.

education.detail: B-Tech, Computer Science and Engineering | 2019–2023 | CGPA: 8.3

certifications: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials — Amazon Web Services
Python Programming & Unix Shell — Presidency University
